message:
fix: reconnect WebSocket after tab switch to correct target

- Add WebSocket reconnection in switchToTarget() to ensure input
  works after switching tabs (pipe session was updated but WebSocket
  was still connected to old page)
- Update discoverPageWebSocketUrl() to find specific target by
  matching current_target_id (with multiple tabs, need correct page)
- Add detailed logging throughout switchToTarget and reconnectPageWebSocket
  to help diagnose any remaining tab switch issues
